name: Anime Edit
description: Turn your photo into 5 cinematic poses + 5 short motion clips, built for viral CapCut-style anime reel editing (beat-synced zooms, glow, motion blur)

default_prompts.pose_1_hand_cover:
Use Image A as a high-fidelity facial reference for realistic identity preservation, authentic facial structure, realistic skin texture, natural eye details, and accurate facial proportions while adapting naturally into a cinematic modern streetwear pose.

Generate a photorealistic cinematic portrait optimized specifically for viral anime-style reel editing, motion blur transitions, beat-sync zoom edits, rotational edits, shake effects, and cinematic intro reveals.

POSE: standing straight, body slightly angled 20-30 degrees, one hand partially covering eyes/face, relaxed posture, subtle confident expression, visible jawline silhouette.

COMPOSITION: perfectly centered framing, medium waist-up shot, leave negative space around subject, subject occupies 45-55% frame height, optimized for zoom crops and motion blur edits.

OUTFIT: oversized plain black or white t-shirt, relaxed modern streetwear fit, dark casual pants, realistic fabric folds.

SCENE: cinematic urban rooftop, outdoor parking area, realistic city background, slightly blurred background depth.

CAMERA: cinematic 35mm lens, slight low-angle perspective, handheld realism, shallow depth of field, HDR photography realism.

LIGHTING: soft golden hour daylight, realistic outdoor shadows, believable skin reflections, cinematic exposure balance.

MAINTAIN: realistic pores, natural hair strands, realistic eye reflections, authentic skin texture.

STRICTLY AVOID: anime style, cartoon look, fantasy clothing, beauty filter appearance, overprocessed AI skin, exaggerated fashion poses.

Optimized for: intro reveal edits, blur openings, zoom pulse effects, motion blur transitions, CapCut-style anime edits.
default_prompts.pose_2_hands_behind_head:
Use Image A as a high-fidelity facial reference while preserving realistic identity, facial proportions, natural skin texture, and authentic facial structure.

Generate a cinematic photorealistic portrait specifically designed for aggressive beat-sync reel edits, glow effects, shake transitions, zoom pulses, and viral CapCut-style anime edits.

POSE: both hands behind head, elbows outward, relaxed confident posture, slight head tilt, chest slightly forward, calm cinematic expression.

COMPOSITION: centered framing, medium shot, enough crop space for zoom edits, balanced negative space around subject.

OUTFIT: oversized black streetwear t-shirt, relaxed urban fashion, realistic clothing folds.

SCENE: cinematic outdoor urban environment, rooftop or street location, soft blurred background.

CAMERA: slight low-angle cinematic shot, handheld realism, shallow depth of field, HDR realistic photography.

LIGHTING: golden hour sunlight, realistic shadows, cinematic skin highlights, believable outdoor reflections.

Optimized for: beat drops, aggressive zoom edits, glow effects, shake transitions, sharpen edits, motion blur impacts.

STRICTLY AVOID: anime style, cartoon look, fantasy clothing, beauty filter appearance, overprocessed AI skin.

Generate a cinematic photorealistic side-profile portrait optimized specifically for cinematic glow edits, zoom transitions, motion blur reels, and anime-style CapCut edits.

POSE: body facing slightly away from camera, head turned sideways, visible side jawline, relaxed shoulders, calm confident expression.

COMPOSITION: centered cinematic framing, medium waist-up crop, enough surrounding crop space for zoom edits.

OUTFIT: oversized plain streetwear t-shirt, dark casual fashion, realistic fabric folds.

SCENE: outdoor cinematic urban environment, rooftop or open road, realistic blurred background depth.

CAMERA: 35mm cinematic lens, slight low-angle perspective, shallow depth of field, handheld photography realism.

LIGHTING: soft natural daylight, cinematic outdoor shadows, realistic skin reflections, golden-hour atmosphere.

Optimized for: cinematic zoom edits, glow effects, rotational transitions, beat-sync edits, blur transitions.

STRICTLY AVOID: anime style, cartoon look, fantasy clothing, beauty filter appearance, overprocessed AI skin.

Use Image A as a high-fidelity facial reference while preserving authentic identity, realistic facial anatomy, natural skin texture, and believable lighting consistency.

Generate a cinematic photorealistic portrait designed specifically for emotional beat-drop edits, slow zoom transitions, motion blur reels, and viral short-form editing workflows.

POSE: head tilted downward, eyes looking slightly down, relaxed shoulders, calm emotional posture, natural body positioning.

COMPOSITION: centered framing, medium cinematic crop, enough surrounding space for zoom-ins and blur transitions.

OUTFIT: oversized minimalist streetwear t-shirt, relaxed urban outfit, realistic fabric folds.

LIGHTING: soft cinematic daylight, realistic shadows, subtle skin highlights, believable outdoor atmosphere.

default_prompts.pose_5_walking:
Use Image A as a high-fidelity facial reference while preserving realistic identity, natural facial structure, authentic skin texture, and believable body proportions.

Generate a cinematic photorealistic urban walking portrait specifically optimized for motion blur transitions, speed ramps, beat-sync edits, and anime-style reel workflows.

COMPOSITION: centered framing, medium-wide shot, enough crop space for directional motion blur and zoom effects.

OUTFIT: oversized streetwear t-shirt, relaxed dark pants, realistic fabric movement, natural clothing folds.

default_prompts.video_1_hand_cover:
Create realistic cinematic movement from the generated portrait while preserving facial identity, realistic anatomy, and authentic lighting consistency.

MOTION: subtle body sway, slight hand movement near face, slow head tilt toward camera, realistic blinking, natural breathing motion, slight clothing movement from wind.

CAMERA MOTION: smooth cinematic push-in, subtle handheld shake, micro rotational movement, realistic motion blur.

TIMING: movement peaks every 0.5-0.8 seconds, optimized for beat-sync editing, ideal for zoom pulses and blur transitions.

VISUAL STYLE: cinematic reel aesthetic, photorealistic outdoor realism, realistic HDR exposure, natural depth of field.

STRICTLY AVOID: face morphing, unstable anatomy, exaggerated motion, floating artifacts, unrealistic body movement.
default_prompts.video_2_hands_behind_head:
Animate the subject with realistic cinematic movement while preserving identity consistency and stable anatomy.

MOTION: subtle elbow movement, slight body sway, natural head movement, realistic blinking, cinematic confident posture.

CAMERA: aggressive slow push-in, micro shake impacts, subtle rotational movement, realistic motion blur.

TIMING: optimized for beat-sync edits, movement impacts every 0.5 seconds, designed for speed ramps and zoom pulses.

VISUAL STYLE: cinematic viral reel style, photorealistic outdoor realism, HDR exposure, handheld camera realism.

STRICTLY AVOID: AI morphing, unrealistic limb motion, face distortion, unstable body proportions.

TIMING: optimized for beat-sync editing, designed for smooth zoom transitions, cinematic pacing.

STRICTLY AVOID: exaggerated body movement, AI face morphing, unstable anatomy, unrealistic motion artifacts.

steps.name: generate_poses
steps.description: Generate 5 cinematic poses for the anime edit

steps.name: generate_videos
steps.description: Animate each pose into a 3-second motion clip (LTX image-to-video)
